name: fable-god-mode
description: Fable God Mode — token-discipline orchestration skills for Claude Code: Fable 5 plans and reviews, cheaper models execute, with an optional independent-critic tier (GPT-5.5 via Codex CLI, or Qwen Code's qwen3.7-plus — chosen at install)

plugins.name: fable-god-mode
plugins.description: 10-80-10 token discipline for Fable 5 sessions: plan at full power, delegate the verbose middle 80% to cheaper Claude subagents, review at full power. Includes the report-only stale-config audit. Needs only a Claude subscription.

plugins.name: fable-super-god-mode
plugins.description: Adds an independent deterministic critic — GPT-5.5 via the OpenAI Codex CLI, or Qwen Code's qwen3.7-plus via Alibaba Cloud Model Studio, chosen at install: tri-state verdict bridge (approved/findings/codex_unavailable), union rule, critique log. Requires fable-god-mode plus either a paid ChatGPT plan with Codex CLI, or an Alibaba Cloud Model Studio account with Qwen Code CLI.
